hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and protects provider outputs with role-based controls, audit logs, and evidence integrity to strengthen institutional compliance workflows and governance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Provider security risks weaken operational control
problem_description: When provider outputs and integrations lack robust security and governance, compliance workflows become vulnerable to unauthorized access and data inconsistencies. This undermines audit readiness and complicates institutional trust and bank due diligence processes for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY enforces role-based access, preserves audit logs and maintains evidence integrity to consolidate provider data into a secure, auditable compliance workflow for institutional VASP operations.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to evidence governance
workflow_description: SFTY secures provider outputs through controlled access, audit logs, permissions and evidence preservation to support trusted compliance workflows and institutional review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. The security control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a secure, auditable layer that connects and governs provider outputs, preserving evidence and enforcing role-based access across compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses with secure provider integration, audit-ready evidence preservation and enterprise deployment for robust internal governance and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides an operational compliance layer that connects provider outputs with secure workflows, role-based access, audit logs and evidence preservation for institutional digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY secure provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY secures provider data through controlled integration points, role-based permissions and configurable governance to support only authorized teams access sensitive compliance outputs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by maintaining detailed decision logs, case histories and provider outputs within a traceable, review-ready compliance record.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into a structured compliance operating workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects and organizes their data to support scalable, auditable compliance operations.
final_title: Review secure compliance deployment with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit logs and provider integration for controlled institutional compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
